judge_result.short_rationale: Canonical truth only requires immediate rinsing of exposed skin with plenty of water for 15–20 minutes. The answer includes that core action, but adds ungrounded details (remove clothing, use soap, do not apply creams, go to hospital immediately with bottle) and misses the source condition that medical attention is needed if symptoms persist or exposure was substantial. Usable, but not tightly source-faithful.
